summary: whoissrc.Lookup constructs a per-call whois.NewClient().SetTimeout(15s) so the goroutine terminates on TCP deadline rather than the library's 30s default.
reason: likexian/whois has no ctx hook; the goroutine could be stranded on an open WHOIS socket for ~30s after the outer ctx already returned. Under check --parallel 8 against a slow server that was 8 sockets held simultaneously.
validated_outcome: go vet/build clean; lookup deadline now matches outer time.After arm.
